conversion_note: Converted for pheragent --oracle-file compatibility. Current pheragent reads top-level fixed_test_commands entries and executes command values.

fixed_test_commands.command: ./mvnw -e --batch-mode --no-snapshot-updates --no-transfer-progress --fail-fast clean test verify -Pjacoco,jdk15ge-simple,'!jdk15ge-add-open',skip-spotless -DtrimStackTrace=false -Dmaven.test.skip=false -Dcheckstyle.skip=false -Dcheckstyle_unix.skip=false -Drat.skip=false -DembeddedZookeeperPath=/home/runner/work/dubbo/dubbo/.tmp/zookeeper 2>&1 | tee >(grep -n -B 1 -A 200 "FAILURE! -- in" > test_errors.log)
